title: Radio Group
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Radio Group wrapper composed from the local Base UI Radio Group primitive, shadcn group/item/indicator slots, local indicator dot rendering, and local class canonicalization.

deviations.summary: The shadcn wrapper composes local Radio Group item attributes instead of importing separate upstream Radio and RadioGroup React primitives.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source must not import React or upstream Base UI runtime packages. The wrapper preserves shadcn slots, classes, and indicator rendering over the local Foldkit primitive.
